---
title: "Sample Workflow with BSBReport"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Sample Workflow with BSBReport}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

The `BSBReport` can provide multiple insights into a bullpen in terms of pitch quality, location, and velocity. To get started, you can install the package like this

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("ADC-405-S26/BSBReport")
library(BSBReport)
```
